CustomField.description: The numeric multiplier for the time unit (Increment) in this Custom Installment Period definition. For example, a value of 2 with Increment "Weeks" creates a bi-weekly schedule; a value of 6 with Increment "Months" creates a semi-annual schedule. Must be a positive integer. Combined with the Increment field to define the complete installment interval for Recurring Donation schedules.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How many time units (Days/Weeks/Months) between installments. For example, 2 with Weeks = every 2 weeks.
CustomField.label: Time Period Frequency
